item.title:
Fitzwilliam__: Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 8h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 10h The momen
item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 8h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 10h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 2 1 43 4 mil

item.title: JohnnyDineen: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 8h En respuesta a @Fitzwilliam__ Thanks lads 4 5 955
item.description: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 8h En respuesta a @Fitzwilliam__ Thanks lads 4 5 955

item.title: JohnnyDineen: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 18h All the top athletes have little siestas before their big sporting events. Ronaldo app
item.description:
Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 18h All the top athletes have little siestas before their big sporting events. Ronaldo apparently takes 6 naps a day so I’ve a bit to go to catch him up !! Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 18h Update: @ JOHNNY DINEEN COUCH TO 5K
@JohnnyDineen preparing for tonight’s 5K. Only six and a half hours to go. Plenty of content to follow from the race. 39 15 732 106 mil
